title: Expeditors (EXPD) Banks on Investor-Aiding Tools & Revenues
text: Shareholder-friendly measures and uptick in airfreight revenues boost Expeditors (EXPD).

title: Why Expeditors (EXPD) Stock Might be a Great Pick
text: Expeditors (EXPD) has seen solid earnings estimate revision activity over the past two months, and belongs to a strong industry as well.

title: Expeditors International (EXPD) Gains But Lags Market: What You Should Know
text: Expeditors International (EXPD) closed at $100.82 in the latest trading session, marking a +0.69% move from the prior day.

title: Expeditors reports ‘meaningful progress' in cyberattack recovery
text: Global logistics provider and freight forwarder Expeditors International said it has “made meaningful progress” in restoring its systems following a devastating cyberattack, but advised customers that the process will take weeks.  The Seattle-based company said in an update Sunday that its enterprise brokerage system will come online this week, with EDI/API connectivity — essential for transmitting shipment and other freight data — as well as transportation, accounting and other systems to follow.

title: Expeditors International (EXPD) Loses 9.3% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
text: Expeditors International (EXPD) is technically in oversold territory now, so the heavy selling pressure might have exhausted. This along with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in raising earnings estimates could lead to a trend reversal for the stock.

title: Expeditors outlines severity of cyberattack, partially resumes operations
text: Expeditors International, a top-five freight management company by revenue, disclosed Wednesday that last month's cyberattack will have a “material adverse impact” on finances and that it will be late filing its 2021 annual report because of difficulty accessing information on its accounting systems. In a separate notice to the Securities and Exchange Commission, the logistics provider said it is making progress returning to normal operations but is unable to estimate when it will resume full operations.

title: Expeditors International expects 'material adverse impact' on results from previously announced cyberattack
text: Expeditors International of Washington Inc. EXPD, -1.79% disclosed Wednesday that the previously announced cyberattack it suffered will have a "material adverse impact" on its business, revenue, expenses, cash flow and reputation. The provider of airfreight, ocean freight and customers brokerage services said it was incurring "significant expenses" as it responds to the attack, and expects to continue to incur higher cybersecurity expenses in the future.

title: 3 Stocks to Buy From a Prospering Transport Services Industry
text: Betterment of freight market conditions bodes well for the Zacks Transportation -Services industry. EXPD, SNDR and MATX are well-poised to capitalize on this uptrend.
